seo.title: Pork Meatballs with Dipping Sauce - Marinda Kook

html:
Pork Meatballs

Ingredients

  • 1 egg
  • 90 ml thick cream
  • 200 ml crustless day-old bread
  • 300 g minced pork
  • 1 clove garlic, crushed
  • 5 ml allspice
  • 5 ml cumin
  • 5 ml chilli flakes
  • 300 g minced beef
  • 5 ml baking powder
  • 20 ml finely grated ginger
  • salt and pepper

Method

Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius. Place on a baking tray on an oven rack that has been well sprayed with Spray and Cook.

Whisk the cream and egg together in a bowl and place the bread in it.

In a mixer, place the minced pork and all the ingredients except the minced beef. Work with the mixer for 2 minutes. Scrape down the sides (this gives the meatballs a nice fine texture)

Now add the bread mixture and stir for another minute

Now mix in the minced beef and mix for about 30 seconds.

Wet your hands with water and shape small meatballs. Place on the rack on the baking tray and bake in the oven for 20 minutes or until nicely browned.

Dipping Sauce

Ingredients

  • 200 ml tomato sauce
  • 125 ml brown sugar
  • 30 ml water
  • 30 ml vinegar
  • 60 ml Worcestershire sauce
  • 100 ml finely chopped onion
  • 2 cloves garlic, crushed
  • 10 – 30 ml chilli flakes
  • salt and pepper

Method

Cook everything together for 10 minutes until it thickens.

 

Easy!
